title: Root Decoration
description: Configuration object for the root decoration.

decoration_block.title: Decoration Block
decoration_block.description: The block used for decorating the roots. This is the legacy property; use decoration_blocks_sequence instead for placing multiple blocks. If both are present, decoration_blocks_sequence takes priority.

block.title: Block
block.description: The block identifier to place (e.g., minecraft:moss_carpet).

count.title: Count
count.description: The number of this block to place. Can be a fixed integer, an array of two integers for a random range (e.g., [1, 2]), or an object with range_min and range_max fields.

anyOf.title: Decoration Blocks Sequence
anyOf.description: Simplified form where each entry is a block identifier string without a count.

decoration_blocks_sequence.title: Decoration Blocks Sequence
decoration_blocks_sequence.description: A list of blocks and counts to place in sequence as decoration. Each entry specifies a block identifier and a count for how many to place. This replaces the legacy decoration_block and num_steps properties. If both formats are present, this property takes priority.

decoration_chance.title: Decoration Chance
decoration_chance.description: Probability of decorating on each step, specified as a fraction with numerator and denominator fields.

numerator.title: Numerator
numerator.description: The numerator of the probability fraction.

denominator.title: Denominator
denominator.description: The denominator of the probability fraction.

defaultSnippets.label: Decoration Chance
defaultSnippets.description: Probability of decorating on each step, specified as a fraction with numerator and denominator fields.

num_steps.title: Num Steps
num_steps.description: Number of decoration blocks to place. This is the legacy property used with decoration_block. Not used if decoration_blocks_sequence is provided.

defaultSnippets.label: Root Decoration
defaultSnippets.description: Configuration object for the root decoration.
